posts.raw_content:
Never be afraid to LOSE.
There is no reward in life without risk or effort.

When you play a new video game what happens at first?

You die over and over and learn.. You get better. You die less frequently.

Eventually you get better and even master the game to become one of the best.

Life works the same way.

All you have to do is make sure you are playing the right game, and keep getting better. There is no failure. Just a graph of you getting better at life!!

Do not give up, do not surrender, do not listen to weaker people. You want something, there is always a price. Master yourself and your skills and do not ever let the noise or weakness of emotions like fear and doubt stop you!

GET AFTER IT!
